metadata.note: The contest to become the Sahel's security patron after France: Africa Corps performance and retreat, Türkiye's drone/training model, US re-engagement, Morocco's Atlantic access offer. CENTROID FIX: EUROPE-RUSSIA was REMOVED from centroid_ids after pre-audit -- on the OR-gate it admitted every Russia title on earth ('drone' 1702 hits dominated by EUROPE-UKRAINE, 'military cooperation' 13 dominated by North Korea, 'arms' 76, 'training' 43). This is the australia_theater lesson: the other participants must be OUT of centroid_ids or the OR-gate swallows their domestic news. Gated on AFRICA-SAHEL alone with the phenomenon in the bundle. DROPPED: drone/arms/training/withdraw/military cooperation/mercenary/instructor/partnership (generic, and each one leaked hard through the Russia gate), AFRICOM/defence deal/patron/Francafrique (0 hits). This is the thinnest atomic in the theater (~25 titles) -- kept because the phenomenon is real and persistent, not because the volume is comfortable.
